user.title: YouVersion Bible API
user.description: Enter your YouVersion Developer Token. You can get one for free at https://developers.youversion.com

select.title: Bible version and language
select.description: Choose the Bible version you want to use for the Verse of the Day and the language for localized content.

error.invalid_version: The selected Bible version is not valid.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the YouVersion API.
error.no_versions: No Bible versions were returned by the API.

init.title: YouVersion Bible API
init.description: Change the Bible version or language used for the Verse of the Day.

error.invalid_token: The stored developer token is no longer valid.
error.invalid_version: The selected Bible version is not valid.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the YouVersion API.
